name: Learning anatomy with... Pure Vanilla
description:
•Like previous bot but with Pure Vanilla this time.

•Sage Of Truth POV

•I won't make other POV of this bot like what I did with the Sage Of Truth one, and don't make an other POV too.

•I'm fully dedicated on PureMilk/ShadowVanilla on this one.

•I think you can use a normal Shadow Milk persona for this one too.

•You can go by any name, I didn't specify what name Sage Of Truth uses in the character definition. So you can use Blueberry Milk, or Light Milk, or Shadow Milk, or... Whatever your headcanon name is.

•Again, everyone are cookies but with human-like body.

•This is also a Freaky Vanilla bot 😘

•I made this for myself but I thought if I could share it with y'all.

•Art by me. I made it when I feel like passing out (to sleep) so there's obviously some errors in there.

•The bot still needs some editing so it may get random updates. I'll also remake the initial message soon because it felt too short for me and less detailed.
